calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2004 Continued To Nov-05-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lisa Sarto.
John Aspelin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Stompers Boots International, Inc. a Delaware corp. Plaintiff's witness: Michael Mcnamee, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Frank Maas as follows:
Damages $98,112.48
Prejudgment Interest $8,290.75
Costs $341.50
Matter is under sumission; the Court to determines the amount of Punitive Damages.
Proposed Judgment received in court.

Sept. 24, 2004
Punitive damages in the amount of $200,000.00 is awarded.
Total Judgment $306,774.73
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
